zh.Kilton Castle, Cleveland, Yorkshire, Eng: 英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭
zh.Castleton, Greater Manchester, England,: 英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特卡斯特萊頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Thwenge於大約1261年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭時，他的父親Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle38歲，母親Lucy de Brus36歲。他和Joan De Mauley至少有1個兒子。他去世於1330年12月2日在英國越可爾馬爾頓享年70歲。

zh-hans.Kilton Castle, Cleveland, Yorkshire, Eng: 英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭
zh-hans.Castleton, Greater Manchester, England,: 英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特卡斯特萊頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Thwenge于大约1261年出生在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭时，他的父亲Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle38岁，母亲Lucy de Brus36岁。他和Joan De Mauley至少有1个儿子。他去世于1330年12月2日在英国越可爾馬爾頓享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Thwenge was born about 1261, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, was 38 and his mother, Lucy de Brus, was 36. He had at least 1 son with Joan De Mauley. He died on 2 December 1330, in Malton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Thwenge est né environ 1261, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Lucy de Brus, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Joan De Mauley. Il est décédé le 2 décembre 1330, à Malton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.Castleton, Greater Manchester, England,: Castleton, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Thwenge um 1261 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle 38 und seine Mutter Lucy de Brus 36. Er hatte mit Joan De Mauley mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 2. Dezember 1330 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Malton, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Thwenge è nato il circa 1261 nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Lucy de Brus, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Joan De Mauley. Morì il 2 dicembre 1330, nel Malton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Thwengeが約1261年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで生まれた時，父Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castleは38歳，母Lucy de Brusは36歳であった。彼はJoan De Mauleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1330年12月2日にイギリスヨークシュアイアマルトンで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Thwenge(이)가 대략 1261년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy de Brus(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Joan De Mauley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1330년 12월 2일 영국 요르크실르 맬턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Joan De Mauley. Ele faleceu em 2 de dezembro de 1330, em Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ro.Castleton, Greater Manchester, England,: Castleton, Greater Manchester, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Thwenge родился около 1261 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy de Brus, 36. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Joan De Mauley. Он умер 2 декабря 1330 г. в местности малтон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Joan De Mauley. Murió el 2 de diciembre de 1330, en Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
